home.title: Home
home.heroTitle: A clean, fluid app shell ready for real work
home.heroSubtitle: The starter screen now has clearer hierarchy, focused actions, and a calmer iPhone-native rhythm.

features.title: Translucent layers
features.description: Light surfaces, soft borders, and system color accents move the template toward iOS 26.

features.title: Focused content
features.description: Default placeholder copy is replaced with a useful home structure and clear entry points.

features.title: Adaptive themes
features.description: The palette follows the device theme while keeping contrast readable in dark mode.

details.title: Details
details.subtitle: This screen keeps the template's core capabilities visible so product pages, components, and data flows can be expanded from here.

stack.title: Expo Router
stack.description: The file-based route structure is preserved for home, details, and fallback screens.

stack.title: NativeWind + StyleSheet
stack.description: Shared components can still use Tailwind while custom visuals stay stable in local styles.

stack.title: i18n Ready
stack.description: Chinese and English copy are updated together for future screens to follow.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: A focused place for app preferences, system capabilities, and future account entry points.

items.title: Appearance
items.description: Follows the device theme and leaves room for manual theme controls.

items.title: Language
items.description: Chinese and English copy are wired up with the same translation structure.

items.title: Notifications
items.description: Keeps a natural home for alerts, messages, and real product toggles.

items.title: Privacy
items.description: Provides a clear place for permissions, data, and security details.

editScreenInfo.title: Open up the code for this screen:
editScreenInfo.description: Change any of the text, save the file, and your app will automatically update.
